title: TRA Annual Report and Accounts 2024-25
text:
The Trade Remedies Authority’s Annual Report and Accounts 2024-25 provides a review of the TRA’s work during this period, including an analysis of its delivery and performance, and position at the end of the reporting period.

Previous Annual Reports and Accounts

Annual report and accounts 2023-24

Annual report and accounts 2021-23

description: The TRA’s Annual Report and Accounts covering 1 April 2024 to 31 March 2025 were laid before Parliament on  17 July 2025.
